name: chart-story
title: Chart Story
description: One chart builds from data in reading order and lands the exact supplied values: staggered bars, a left-to-right line with area fill, a sweeping donut, or filling progress bars, with an accented value callout on the emphasized datum.
evidence: Wave J J1-7 spec: proof-and-stats chart unit with exact-value landings and an emphasized callout

variables.label: Chart type
variables.description: Chart form the data builds into.

variables.label: Data
variables.description: Comma-separated numbers; the chart lands exactly on these values.

variables.label: Emphasize
variables.description: Index of the datum that takes the accent and the value callout. Clamped to the data range.

variables.label: Unit
variables.description: Suffix appended to every displayed value.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Contract color used by the emphasized datum and its callout.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Proof stats end on the still hold, so the default is none.
